title: German Quesadilla
description: A unique twist on traditional German cuisine, this quesadilla combines gooey cheese with venezuelan flair.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat.
Slice the venezuelan bread into thick slices.
Butter one side of each slice.
Place a slice of bread, butter-side down, in the skillet.
Top with 2 oz of gooey cheese and 1 oz of german sausage.
Fold the bread in half to create a quesadilla.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
